name: DynaVap M Plus
summary: Butane-heated, no electronics, extraordinary flavour. The most repairable vaporiser made.
description: The DynaVap M Plus is a different category. A simple titanium capsule, heated with a butane torch (sold separately), produces clouds of clean, flavourful vapour with zero battery anxiety. Modular, repairable, will still work in fifteen years. A cult object — for the right patient, the only device they want.
